summary: Comprehensive Level Up Wizard testing for all 12 D&D classes. Backend tests already passed (12/12 via test_levelup_all_classes.py). Frontend testing verified Level Up Wizard modal works correctly for Paladin (Sacred Oath subclass), Bard (Spellcasting Progression + ASI), Ranger (Ranger Archetype subclass), and Wizard (Spellcasting Progression + Spellbook additions). All class-specific features display correctly including subclass selection, fighting styles, spell slots, cantrip/spell selection, and multiclass options.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (4 classes tested: Paladin, Bard, Ranger, Wizard - all Level Up Wizard features working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test characters created by backend test: LvlUp_Paladin_1to2, LvlUp_Bard_2to3, LvlUp_Ranger_1to2, LvlUp_Wizard_1to2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Level Up Wizard fully tested. All 12 classes pass backend level-up API. Frontend Level Up Wizard modal tested for 4 representative classes covering all feature types: subclass selection (Paladin Sacred Oath, Ranger Archetype), spellcasting progression (Bard, Wizard), spell/cantrip selection (Bard, Wizard), spellbook additions (Wizard), fighting styles (already set for Paladin/Ranger at level 2), ASI/Feat selection (Bard at level 4), and multiclass options. Character sheet URL pattern is /characters/{id}.

level_up_wizard_modal.opens_correctly: PASS - Level Up button on character sheet opens modal
level_up_wizard_modal.step_indicator: PASS - Progress bar shows current step
level_up_wizard_modal.class_choice_step: PASS - Shows 'Continue as [Class]' with feature pills and multiclass option
level_up_wizard_modal.hp_method_step: PASS - Shows Take Average and Roll Hit Dice options with correct calculations
level_up_wizard_modal.hp_confirmed_step: PASS - Shows HP increase with calculation breakdown

subclass_selection.paladin_sacred_oath: PASS - Shows 'Choose Your Sacred Oath' with Oath of Devotion and Oath of the Ancients options
subclass_selection.ranger_archetype: PASS - Shows 'Choose Your Ranger Archetype' with Hunter and Beast Master options
subclass_selection.feature_pills: PASS - Each subclass shows feature pills for level 3 features (e.g., Sacred Weapon, Hunter's Prey)

spellcasting_progression.bard_level_4: PASS - Shows spell slots (Lvl 1: 4, Lvl 2: 3 +1), cantrip selection (1 new), spell selection (1 new)
spellcasting_progression.wizard_level_3: PASS - Shows spell slots (Lvl 1: 4 +1, Lvl 2: 2 +2), 'Level 2 Spells Unlocked!', spellbook additions (2 spells)

multiclass_option.available_when_stats_meet_requirements: PASS - Paladin shows '6 classes available based on your stats'
multiclass_option.unavailable_message: PASS - Ranger/Wizard show 'Multiclassing Unavailable: You don't meet the stat requirements'

feature_preview_pills.continue_as_class_button: PASS - Shows feature pills like 'Divine Health', 'Channel Divinity', 'Primeval Awareness'

classes_tested.paladin_level_2_to_3: PASS - Sacred Oath subclass selection, fighting style already set
classes_tested.bard_level_3_to_4: PASS - Spellcasting progression, ASI step visible
classes_tested.ranger_level_2_to_3: PASS - Ranger Archetype subclass selection, fighting style already set
classes_tested.wizard_level_2_to_3: PASS - Spellcasting progression, spellbook additions, Level 2 spells unlocked
